rationale: The citing paper is an editorial perspective (not a new empirical or methodological study) and its note says prior studies are used illustratively, which can indicate non-core citations. The matched evidence here is only a DOI-level match with no local citation context or reference text, so there is no clear sign of substantive use of the 2000 historical-method article. With this limited evidence, a confident drop is not fully safe, but clear keep evidence is also missing.
